items.title: Standings
items.description: Multi-class race standings with class headers, focus row, gaps, laps, and pit state.

items.title: Relative
items.description: Nearby cars around the focus driver with lap relationship coloring and compact empty-row spacing.

items.title: Fuel Calculator
items.description: Race stint plan, current fuel, stop count, and measured/history-backed burn evidence.

modelSummary.source: burn 3.1 L/lap (measured green lap) | 34.2 laps/tank | history user | gap O0.18 C0.04

items.title: Gap To Leader
items.description: Live gap trend with connected history lines, intervals, and race-context summary rows.

items.title: Track Map
items.description: IBT-derived Nurburgring 24h track shape with car markers and focus-car highlighting.

modelSummary.source: source: IBT-derived Nurburgring 24h track map | live position telemetry

items.title: Track Map Fallback
items.description: Circular fallback map used when generated geometry is unavailable.

items.title: Session / Weather
items.description: Session, clock, lap, track, weather, wind, temperature, and atmosphere metrics.

items.title: Pit Service - Active
items.description: Pit signal, service status, fuel/repair requests, and per-tire service grid.

items.title: Pit Service - Idle
items.description: Pit-ready idle state with safe placeholders for unavailable tire and service values.

items.title: Input / Car State
items.description: Throttle, brake, steering, gear, speed, ABS, and trace graph evidence.

items.title: Car Radar
items.description: Both-sides proximity warning with radar rings and side-pressure arcs.

items.title: Flags
items.description: Full flag palette: green, blue, yellow, caution, red, black, repair, white, and checkered.
items.status: green + blue + yellow + caution + red + black + repair + white + checkered

modelSummary.status: green + blue + yellow + caution + red + black + repair + white + checkered

items.title: Stream Chat
items.description: Twitch-style chat with badges, emotes, names, timestamps, and message text.

items.title: Garage Cover
items.description: Garage-visible full-canvas cover image used for broadcast or stream masking.
